name: Unsafe ActiveX Control Marked Safe For Scripting
description: An ActiveX control designed for restricted use is marked as safe-for-scripting, allowing attackers to access dangerous functionality through web pages that invoke the control's unsafe methods.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL(ActiveX_control) has META(safe-for-scripting) flag set despite containing TRANSFORM methods that perform privileged CONTROL operations, accessible from untrusted EXTERNAL(web_page)
